headline: JPMorgan Raises its Price Target on Edison International (EIX) to $75
summary: Edison International (NYSE:EIX) is one of the 10 Best Utility Stocks that Beat Earnings Estimates. On May 1, 2026, JPMorgan analyst Aidan Kelly raised the firm’s price target on Edison International (NYSE:EIX) to $75 from $74 previously while maintaining a Neutral rating on the shares. On April 29, 2026, Barclays lowered its price target on […]
